workflow.banner: Guided workflow: Load dataset -> Select variables -> Choose models -> Train and inspect

workflow.step1_actions_hint: Use top menu: File for data actions, Help for guide/about.
workflow.step2_hint: 2/4 Choose target/features and validation. If unsure, keep defaults.
workflow.step3_hint: 3/4 Pick one or more models to include in training.
workflow.step3_actions_hint: Review your selected model pool before moving to training.
workflow.step4_hint: 4/4 Start training and monitor real-time progress below.
workflow.step4_model_hint: Need changes? Return to Step 3 to adjust the selected models.
workflow.step4_actions_hint: Use top menu: Settings for plots, SHAP, exports and session tools.

results.training_summary_placeholder: Training summary and model ranking will appear here.
results.empty: No training result yet. Start training to unlock Results Hub.
results.save_tooltip: Persist current temporary run outputs into output/runs.
results.publication_helper_tooltip: Open Publication Studio to manage assets, value labels, and naming rules.
results.best_model_placeholder: Best model summary will appear here after training.

jobs.hint: Queued, running and failed jobs are tracked here. Use retry for failed jobs.

feature_engineering.title: Feature Engineering
feature_engineering.load_dataset_first: Load a dataset before enabling Feature Engineering.

data_preview.title: Data Preview
data_preview.note: Showing first {rows:,} rows and {cols:,} of {total_cols:,} columns (dataset: {total_rows:,} x {total_cols:,})

column_selection.title: Select Target and Features
column_selection.target_tooltip: Target variable cannot be selected as a feature.

model_selection.title: Choose Models
model_selection.info: Select one or more models for training. You can reopen this popup any time.

common.tip_fast: Quick baseline set for fastest iteration.
common.tip_ensemble: Tree ensemble models for non-linear patterns.
common.tip_robust: Strong mixed set for robust benchmark comparisons.
common.tip_clear: Disable all models and start from scratch.

plot_selection.title: Customize Plots...
plot_selection.info: Choose visual outputs and optional extra analyses to run automatically after training.
plot_selection.tip_visuals_only: Enable all plot visuals and disable extra analyses.
plot_selection.tip_diagnostics: Keep only model-fit and diagnostics visuals enabled.
plot_selection.tip_explainability: Keep only explainability visuals enabled (importance and SHAP).
plot_selection.tip_research_default: Uses widely reported regression diagnostics: residuals vs fitted, parity plot, Q-Q, residual distribution, learning curve, global importance and SHAP summary.
plot_selection.tip_everything: Enable all visuals and all extra analyses.
plot_selection.tip_clear_all: Disable all visuals and extra analyses.

shap_settings.title: SHAP Settings
shap_settings.info: Default: SHAP analyzes all features. Configure options below to customize.
shap_settings.info_tip: SHAP settings are saved and applied to future training runs automatically. Change them here anytime; they persist via QSettings.
shap_settings.info_detail:
These settings control how SHAP analyses are run:

• All features vs Top-N: Limit plots to the top-N most important features, or include all.
• Variance threshold: Optionally drop near-constant features to reduce noise.
• Always include: Ensure certain raw feature names are always analysed.

Your choices are persisted via QSettings and applied on the next training run.
shap_settings.top_n_tip: When enabled, limit SHAP analysis to the top-N most important features.
shap_settings.var_checkbox_tip: Drop near-constant features before SHAP to reduce noise. Uncheck to disable.
shap_settings.var_spin_tip: Treat features with variance below this threshold as near-constant.
shap_settings.include_tip: Ensure these raw feature names are always included even if filtered.

about.title: About - Machine Learning Trainer
about.description:
This application provides a professional workflow for loading data,
selecting features, training multiple models in the background,
and generating publication-quality plots and explainability outputs (SHAP).
about.key_features:
Key features:
• Modern, responsive UI with persistent settings
• Background training with progress and logs
• Robust metrics, statistics, and Excel exports
• SHAP explainability with configurable options
• Publication-ready plots (PNG/PDF)
about.guide_missing: info.pdf not found in project root.
about.app_subtitle: Professional Regression Model Training and Evaluation
about.app_desc: This application provides a professional machine learning workflow designed for data loading, feature selection, parallel model training in the background, and generating publication-quality explainer (SHAP) outputs.
about.dev_info:
Taha İlter Akar

🎓 FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg
💼 Research Assistant, Fraunhofer IIS

✉️ taha.ilter.akar@fau.de


This application is designed to automate data science and machine learning processes
and provide a professional toolset.

publication_helper.title: Publication Studio
publication_helper.setup_offer_message: Would you like to open Publication Studio now? Variable label changes will be applied to training outputs (plots, figures, tables).
publication_helper.info: Prepare manuscript-ready outputs in a guided flow: define study focus, review training variables, label values, then export.
publication_helper.study_focus_hint: What is your dependent variable? This selection is added to captions to keep outputs publication-ready.
publication_helper.variables_hint: Only dependent and independent variables used in training are shown here. Use recommendation labels if needed.
publication_helper.value_labels_hint: Value labels convert coded values into readable text in exported tables. Example: gender, 0 -> female, 1 -> male.
publication_helper.value_labels_hint_setup: Value labels convert coded values into readable text in training outputs (plots, figures, tables). Example: gender, 0 -> female, 1 -> male.
publication_helper.axis_label_hint: Axis and variable naming are managed in Step 2 (Variables). This step only changes cell values in table exports.
publication_helper.axis_label_hint_setup: Axis and variable naming are managed in Step 2 (Variables). This step maps coded feature values for training visuals and exported tables.
publication_helper.raw_value_placeholder: Single value or comma-separated values, e.g. 1,2,3
publication_helper.quick_value_required: Provide raw value(s) and display value to add a rule. You can enter multiple raw values with commas.
publication_helper.value_rules_summary: {count} value-label rule(s) active. These are applied to exported table values.
publication_helper.value_rules_summary_setup: {count} value-label rule(s) active. These are applied to training outputs (plots, figures, tables) for feature-level display labels.
publication_helper.format_rules_hint: Define display formats for table columns (binary, percentage, decimal precision).
publication_helper.format_rules_summary: {count} display format rule(s) active. Applied to exported table columns.
publication_helper.naming_hint: Define naming transformations for manuscript labels and output filenames.
publication_helper.rules_empty: Add at least one naming rule before applying to labels.
publication_helper.rules_applied: Naming rules were applied to selected labels.
publication_helper.rules_summary: {count} variable naming rule(s) active. These labels are applied to tables, figures, and captions.
publication_helper.error_no_selection: Select at least one asset to export.
publication_helper.error_output_dir: Please choose a valid output folder.
publication_helper.error_study_target: Please define your study target (dependent variable) before export.
publication_helper.training_name_collision: Studio variable labels create duplicate training names. Please keep target/features unique.
publication_helper.training_target_missing: Mapped target column was not found in the training dataset.
publication_helper.training_features_missing: Some mapped feature columns were not found: {names}
publication_helper.error_duplicate: Duplicate output names detected. Please use unique names.

save_status.temporary: Temporary run: click Save This Run to persist

decision.reason_pending: Confidence is pending because no completed training metrics are available yet.
decision.reason_manual: R2 was not found in the best model row. Confidence cannot be auto-scored.
decision.next_manual: Review diagnostics and set acceptance criteria before exporting.
decision.reason_high: R2 is {r2:.3f} (>= 0.80), which meets the high-confidence threshold.
decision.next_high: Proceed to Publication Studio and export manuscript assets.
decision.reason_medium: R2 is {r2:.3f} (between 0.60 and 0.80), indicating moderate confidence.
decision.next_medium: Review SHAP and residual diagnostics before finalizing outputs.
decision.reason_low: R2 is {r2:.3f} (< 0.60). Model fit is currently below the confidence target.
decision.next_low: Revisit feature engineering, model set, and validation settings, then rerun.

results.no_run_to_save: No result run is available to save.
results.already_saved: Current run is already saved in output/runs.
